title: Indian Food Isn’t Always Spicy!
description:
Think Indian food is all about spice? Think again.

From Odisha’s soothing Pakhala Bhata to Tamil Nadu’s creamy Mor Kuzhambu, and Kerala’s soft Appam with stew—India has a whole world of comforting, non-spicy dishes.

Add to that dishes like Dalma, Malai Kofta, Chingri Malai Curry, and Pidi.

Simple, balanced, and full of flavor—without the heat.

What’s a famous non-spicy dish from your state? Tell me below
